driver = , login = None @pytest.mark.smoke @allure.title("Product Creation with Image Rotation Upload") def test_create_product(driver, login): wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 60) # ✅ STEP 1: Go to PRODUCTS LIST (NOT /new page) driver.get( "https://app-hire-x-dev-multi-tenant-angular-01-bkgee7ewapa0c5es.southeastasia-01.azurewebsites.net/supplier/products" ) # ✅ STEP 2: Wait for Products page wait.until( EC.url_contains("/supplier/products") ) # ✅ STEP 3: Click NEW button (IMPORTANT FIX) new_btn = wait.until( EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.XPATH, "//button[normalize-space()='New']")) ) driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", new_btn) #
